name: MODINE MANUFACTURING CO
summary: PARTI . At Modine Manufacturing Company, we are Engineering a Cleaner, Healthier World . For more than 100 years, we have been a trusted leader in designing, engineering, testing, and manufacturing mission-critical thermal solutions. Our technologies heat, cool, and ventilate, with systems that drive performance, efficiency, and reliability for our customers.
